name: Eiichi Takahashi
description: He is the Vice President of Yotsuba Material Planning Division and Yotsuba Homes. He's never had what it takes to be a true leader and was selected to attend the meetings to make [Higuchi](https://anilist.co/character/1928) look good. Other members view Takahashi as "foolish" because he does not "seem to put much thought into his comments." Takahashi was formally married with children and is a graduate of Keiyo Business School. He is the son of Karazo Takahashi, the president of Japan Financial Times, and maintained a hobby in surfing.
